metro_transfer_station_count: How many stations are served by two or more colored routes?
Count the transfer stations, where a transfer station belongs to at least two routes.
What is the number of stations shared by two or more colored routes?
How many labeled stations are transfer stations?
Count stations that appear on multiple colored routes.
metro_route_transfer_station_count: On the {route_name} route, how many stations are served by two or more colored routes?
Count the transfer stations on the {route_name} route.
How many stations on the {route_name} route are shared with another colored route?
What is the number of {route_name} route stations that are transfer stations?
Following the {route_name} route, count stations where at least one other colored route also stops.
metro_route_single_route_station_count: On the {route_name} route, how many stations are served only by that route?
Count the non-transfer stations on the {route_name} route.
How many stations on the {route_name} route do not belong to any other colored route?
What is the number of {route_name} route stations served by exactly one colored route?
Following the {route_name} route, count stations where no other colored route also stops.
metro_exact_distance_count: How many stations have shortest metro-route distance exactly {query_distance} route segments from station {query_label}?
Count stations exactly {query_distance} route segments away from {query_label}.
What is the number of stations at route distance {query_distance} from {query_label}?
Following route segments, how many stations are exactly {query_distance} steps from {query_label}?
Count the stations whose shortest route from {query_label} uses exactly {query_distance} segments.
metro_shortest_path_length: The metro map has a unique shortest station path from station {source_label} to station {goal_label}. How many route segments are in that path?
Following route segments, how many segments are in the unique shortest path from {source_label} to {goal_label}?
What is the shortest-path length in route segments from station {source_label} to station {goal_label}?
Find the unique shortest station path from {source_label} to {goal_label}. How many route segments does it contain?
How many route segments lie on the unique shortest metro path from station {source_label} to station {goal_label}?

code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a labeled metro route map with colored routes and stations
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count or length as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_transfer_station_count: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of all transfer stations
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_route_transfer_station_c: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of all transfer stations on the {route_name} route; use an empty array when there are none
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_route_single_route_stati: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of all stations served only by the {route_name} route
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_exact_distance_count: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of all stations whose shortest metro-route distance from {query_label} is exactly {query_distance} route segments
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_shortest_path_length: set "annotation" to an ordered array of [x,y] pixel points at station centers along the unique shortest path from {source_label} to {goal_label}, excluding {source_label} and including {goal_label}
